svg.title: RDMA RC 전체 흐름
svg.desc: RDMA Reliable Connection의 Setup, Write, Read 전체 흐름

g.text: A. Connection setup — control path (CPU + kernel)

svg.text: 4. Exchange QPN, PSN, GID/LID, MTU, remote VA + rkey

g.text: 이 시점부터 one-sided RDMA는 remote CPU 개입 없음
B. RDMA WRITE — initiator pushes data into remote MR
C. RDMA READ — initiator pulls data from remote MR

svg.text: QP=Queue Pair · MR=Memory Region · CQE=Completion Queue Entry · PSN=Packet Sequence Number
